note: scripts/sync.sh overwrites ONLY the files listed in managed_files — which include the two machinery READMEs knowledge/templates/README.md and knowledge/golden/README.md. Everything else is yours and is never touched: PROJECT.md, your knowledge/ notes, your knowledge/templates/ type notes, your knowledge/golden/ notes, and your work/** deliverables.
